stemHtml: Consider an aircraft flying straight and level with a constant thrust setting in the speed unstable region of the drag curve. Suddenly, the aircraft encounters windshear and the headwind changes to a tailwind. What happens to the indicated airspeed and total drag?

options.a: The airspeed remains constant, and there is no change in total drag.
options.b: The airspeed increases. The parasite drag increases more than the induced drag decreases which leads to an increase in total drag.
options.c: The airspeed decreases. The parasite drag decreases, but induced drag increases more than the decrease in parasite drag so the total drag increases.
options.d: The airspeed decreases. The parasite drag decreases by more than the induced drag increases, so the total drag decreases.
